title: Bagseri Lunch Bag for Girls - Kids Lunch Box for Girls Reusable Leak-Proof and Insulated Kids Lunch Bag Toddler Lunch Box for Daycare and School, Pink Rainbow (Water Bottle Not Included)
features: Superior temperature control: Insulated lunch bag keeps meals chilled or warm for up to five to six hours thanks to premium heavy-duty insulation ideal for school days or family outings to the park
Child-safe & hassle-free cleaning: Features a PEVA lining that’s gentle on food and simple to wipe clean no leaks or lingering odours so lunch stays fresh and tidy

Smart storage solutions: Side pocket snugly fits a 600 ml water bottle without spills, roomy main compartment holds lunch plus snacks while the inner pocket keeps utensils neat, front zip pocket for secret treats or little notes

Spacious yet compact: Measures 25 cm x 12 cm x 20 cm (10" x 4.7" x 7.8") with a six-litre capacity—enough for nine cans of cola plus fruit and yoghurt; Wide double-zip opening for quick packing and unpacking
Easy to tote around: Weighs just 210 grams with a handy clip-on strap for attaching to backpacks, perfect for school runs, picnics or weekend adventures
description: Product Description Why Choose Bagseri Kids Insulated Lunch Bag? 1. Excellent Long-term Insulation 2. Food Grade Safe BPA Free Interior Liner 3. Easy to Carry, Conveniently Attach It to Backpack 4. High Quality and Long-lasting Material, Well-constructed 5. Wide Opening For Faster Top-load Packing and Locks In Cool, Dry Air Kids Friendly Design Easy to Clean The PEVA liner is easy to clean, simply wipe with a damp cloth or tissue if dirty. Convenient Buckle Handle The lunch bag with a detachable buckle handle which can easily hang the lunch bag on the backpack, freeing children's hands. Smooth Double-zipper The smooth double-zipper design makes this kids lunch bag easier for the little one to manage mealtime on their own. Front Zipper Pocket The thoughtful zipper pocket is great for ID cards, napkins, wipes, key. Prepare Healthy and Fresh Lunch for Kids Kid's Favorite Patterns, Perfect Gift for Kids Is the lunch box safe for my child? Yes, our lunch boxes are made from non-toxic materials and are BPA-free. They undergo rigorous safety testing to ensure they meet or exceed industry standards. Can the lunch bag keep food fresh until lunchtime? Absolutely! Our lunch bags are designed with 3-layer insulation material to keep food at the right temperature until your child is ready to eat. Plus, they come with leak-proof lining to prevent any spills. Are the lunch bag easy to clean? Definitely! Our lunch boxes are constructed with easy-to-clean materials. Simply wipe them down with a damp cloth. Do the lunch bag come in appealing designs that kids will love? Yes, we offer a variety of fun and colorful designs that kids will adore. Such as cute unicorn, mermaid and dinosaur themes, there's something to suit every child's taste. Are the lunch bag durable enough to withstand daily wear and tear? Absolutely! Our lunch bag are built to last with high-quality materials and sturdy construction. They can withstand the rough and tumble of daily use, ensuring they'll be a reliable lunchtime companion for your child.
